source_refs.source_quote: a standard derate for altitude from National Fuel Gas Code ANSI Z223.1 of 4% per 1000 feet above sea level may be taken.
In Canada, the input rating must be derated by 10 percent for altitudes of 2,000 ft. to 4,500 ft. above sea level
When an appliance is installed at elevations above 4500 ft, the certified high-altitude input rating shall be reduced at the rate of 4% for each additional 1000 ft.
